name: Monkey.D.Luffy - ST13-014 (Pirate Foil)
effect_text: [Activate:Main] You may trash this Character: Reveal 1 card from the top of your Life cards. If that card is a [Monkey.D.Luffy] with a cost of 5, you may play that card. If you do, up to 1 of your Leader gains +2000 power until the end of your opponent's next turn.
